data.name: Brothel Virgin - The Crimson Reverie
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to your first night at the brothel.
You don’t know what to expect — but you’re definitely not ready.

In Brothel Virgin, you’ll spend one surreal, steamy night choosing between unique companions — each with their own personalities, secrets, and fully animated scenes.

✨ Features

  • 🎞️ Animated NSFW scenes with multiple outcomes

  • 👯 Companions with branching paths — replayable, spicy, and weird in the best way

  • 🎮 Minigames and interactive kinks

  • 🃏 Bonus Discord-integrated card game (optional)

The brothel’s always open — but only a few get invited to the VIP room.
Will you be one of them?
data.about_the_game:
Welcome to your first night at the brothel.

data.short_description: Your first night in a brothel. Nervous? Excited? You’ve got one night to pick your companion — or unlock a hidden VIP experience. Animated scenes, wild choices, and more secrets than you can handle.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1+ (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics (Intel HD 4000 or better)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
  • VR 支援: N/A
  • 備註: Runs on most modern PCs and laptops.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated GPU not required
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.13+ (High Sierra or newer)
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
  • 備註: Runs natively on Apple Silicon & Intel.
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 11+ (Big Sur or newer)
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 18.04 LTS or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
  • VR 支援: N/A
  • 備註: Compatible with Steam Deck.
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04 LTS or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
